title: Nonitoo's Modpack
description: A client-side modpack that makes Minecraft more beautiful.
body:
# Nonitoo's Modpack
Nonitoo's Modpack will make your Minecraft more beautiful by using shaders and different modpacks while keeping it fairly optimized. It adds tons of visual mods and texture packs to make a more realistic experience while maintaining the original Minecraft aesthetic.

## Shaders
This mod includes 3 different shaders to choose from: 
- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders/versions) 
- [Complementary-unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) 
- [Complementary-reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

You can choose your preferred shader pack. The default one is BSL Shaders, with mostly default settings; the only major change is Black Outlines.

## Resource Packs
There are 5 resource packs in this modpack without counting those added by mods.
- [Axolotl Bucket Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-bucket-variants) - Shows axolotl variants in the buckets.
- [Better Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-lanterns) - Makes lanterns and chains 3D.
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - Makes all mobs move more realistically.
- [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) - Makes the player move more realistically.
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#icoeJp) - Custom resource pack made with Vanilla Tweaks which makes tons of changes.

The resource packs should be arranged in this order:
![resource_order_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f6602f58843b378f49d0b606627801a6b692cb6_0.webp)
![resource_order_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/069989c7ebe3553c0d8368b837ecc0842d231405_0.webp)
